title: Persistent Creative Inventory
description: Restore the location of the creative inventory you last scrolled to.
body:
This mod will restore the location of the creative inventory you last scrolled to.

![demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/b6Drmxwj/images/bdd96ab7e5da4c67e79b6b112e7358f2a0094f4b.gif)

This mod also fixes a [bug that lets you accidentally click on the tab after dragging the scroll bar](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-179165).

![demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/b6Drmxwj/images/6b230f033e85490aa0fbd6971ff4a144675c836f.gif)
